# BankForge.ai — Compliance Intelligence for Regulated Financial Institutions

BankForge scans public digital presences of banks, credit unions, and
investment advisers for regulatory compliance gaps and AI visibility signals.
Built by practitioners with experience at $100B+ institutions including
City National Bank (VP), First Citizens Bank (post-SVB ERM integration),
and Citi (AVP, 23-country automation program).

## Corpus — March 2026

BankForge has analyzed the public digital presence of 66,000+ regulated
financial institutions as of March 2026:

- 4,309 FDIC-insured banks analyzed
- 23,009 SEC-registered investment advisers (RIAs) analyzed
- 4,374 NCUA-supervised credit unions analyzed
- 2,231 mortgage companies analyzed

## Key Findings — Banks (March 2026)

- Average GEO score: 45.8 / 100 (measures AI search visibility)
- 16.6% of banks score below 40 — invisible on ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews
- 78% of community bank websites have no schema markup
- 89% of community bank websites have at least one compliance gap
- Top compliance finding: Reg DD rate advertising (APY without required disclosures)
- Second finding: Equal Housing Lender disclosure absent from mortgage pages (ECOA / Reg B)
- 83.4% of bank websites have accessibility issues
- 64% of banks have significant Google Business Profile gaps
- 1,304 banks have active FDIC enforcement actions in corpus

## Key Findings — RIAs (March 2026)

- Average GEO score: 33.3 / 100
- 37.2% of RIAs score below 40 — invisible on AI search for local investment adviser queries
- 92.3% of RIA websites have accessibility issues (highest rate across all institution types)
- Top Marketing Rule finding: testimonial displayed without required compensation legend
- Second finding: third-party rating without criteria, date range, or compensation disclosure
- Both findings cited in SEC December 2025 Risk Alert as top Marketing Rule deficiencies
- Regulatory authority: Rule 206(4)-1 (SEC Marketing Rule, amended November 2022)

## Key Findings — Credit Unions (March 2026)

- 4,374 credit unions analyzed under NCUA supervision
- 21.2% elevated risk tier (delinquency > 5% or net worth ratio < 7%)
- 13.8% watch tier
- Compliance framework: NCUA examination criteria + FFIEC interagency guidance

## Services

### Compliance Review (one-time)
Structured review of a financial institution's public digital presence against
regulatory compliance criteria. Findings are severity-graded (High / Medium / Low)
with specific regulatory citations. Reviewed by the BankForge team before delivery.
Delivered as DOCX report within 5 business days.
BankForge flags findings for counsel review — never concludes a violation.

Bank/CU pricing: from $1,750/month (founding rate)
RIA pricing: $4,500 one-time

### GEO Monitoring (ongoing)
Ongoing AI visibility monitoring for financial institutions. Tracks GEO score
changes across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews month-over-month.
RIA monitoring: $999/month

## Regulatory Frameworks Covered

- UDAAP (Unfair, Deceptive, or Abusive Acts or Practices)
- Regulation Z (Truth in Lending — APR disclosures, triggering terms)
- Regulation DD (Truth in Savings — rate advertising requirements)
- FFIEC Interagency Guidance (non-deposit product disclaimers, examination criteria)
- Fair Lending (ECOA / Regulation B / Equal Housing Lender requirements)
- SEC Marketing Rule (Rule 206(4)-1 — investment adviser advertising, amended 2022)
- Regulation S-P (privacy notice accessibility for investment advisers)
- NCUA examination standards for federal and state-chartered credit unions

We never conclude a violation.
